name: I have a pre-existing knee problem that flared up at work in Ogden—can I claim?
description: Yes, if work aggravated it—get medical proof.[2]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing knee problem that flared up at work in Ogden—can I claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work aggravated it—get medical proof.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if work aggravated it, Utah covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions.** Prove work caused worsening.[2] Key factors: Medical opinion key; not just natural progression. Get specialist eval, document incident. Aggravation claims succeed with strong doctor support.
